name: Banana Nut Carrot Cake Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup pineapple juice (or orange or apple)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9" x 12-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, cinnamon, cloves, and baking powder.
4. In a smaller bowl, beat together the eggs; add sugar and honey; whisk in the oil and juice (pineapple, orange, or apple). Mix into the dry ingredients. Stir in the carrots, bananas, and walnuts.
5. Pour mixture into the baking dish.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool for 50 to 60 minutes before serving with vanilla ice cream or yogurt.
